title: Macrame Keychain
excerpt: Create a stunning spiral pattern keychain using simple half hitch knots.

steps.title: Prepare cords
steps.description: Cut one cord 30cm (core) and one cord 100cm (working cord).

steps.title: Start the spiral
steps.description: Tie half hitch knots in the same direction to create the spiral effect.

steps.title: Continue knotting
steps.description: Keep making half hitches until you reach your desired bracelet length.

steps.title: Attach clasp
steps.description: Trim excess cord, seal ends with a lighter, and attach the clasp.

tips: Keep consistent tension for an even spiral
Try different colored cords for a two-tone effect

videoTutorials.title: Macrame Diamond Keychain DIY (Easy Tutorial for Beginners!
